subject:
Re: The error information in the worker_0_crash.txt in M
 refinement.
body:
I suspected that GPU memory was not enough. How can I deal with that?

Could I delete some particles in the final data.star? Or I have to run the 
relion refine with fewer particles.
在2021年5月5日星期三 UTC+8 下午7:33:39<yuqi zhang> 写道：

> When I did the subtomo-averaging refinement after relion's results, M 
> reported this error information in the worker_0_crash.txt.
>
> *System.Exception: cudaErrorMemoryAllocation*
> *   at Warp.GPU.CheckGPUExceptions() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\GPU.cs:line 
> 1175*
> *   at WarpWorker.Program.Main(String[] args) in 
> D:\Dev\warp2\WarpWorker\Program.cs:line 322*
>
> My GPU was Quadro GV100 32GB*2. The memory was 128 GB.
>
